specific_question: How frequently does Elexion Automotive evaluate the performance of its dealers, and what problems with data quality influence these evaluations?
answer: In February 2025, Elexion Automotive's dealer performance review occurred quarterly but relied on self-review data from dealerships, with Emily Lee estimating that 34% of performance metrics were incomplete or submitted late.
dr_question: How could Elexion Automotive utilize Automotive Cloud's dealer performance management tools by early 2027 to strengthen relationships with its North American dealer network and, at the same time, maintain 90% of its direct-to-government sales channel?
